channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: SOLID Code
item.description: Learn SOLID design principles for cleaner, scalable code.

item.title: Edge Unleashed
item.description: Unlock Edge Computing's full potential & discover its game-changing applications.

item.title: Write to Thrive
item.description: Boost your career with technical writing skills. Learn to communicate complex ideas with clarity.

item.title: Terraform: Code Your Cloud
item.description: Learn Terraform: automate cloud infrastructure with code

item.title: Code Clean
item.description: Learn Clean Code Principles for better software development

item.title: Tailwind CSS: Utility-First
item.description: Learn Tailwind CSS utility-first design for faster, more efficient styling.

item.title: Refactor Now
item.description: Improve code quality & reduce debt. Learn to refactor legacy code efficiently.

item.title: Grid+Flex
item.description: Master CSS Grid & Flexbox with Grid+Flex. Learn layouts, examples & best practices.

item.title: Optimize SQL
item.description: Boost database performance with expert SQL optimization tips and techniques.

item.title: Data Mesh: Scale Insights
item.description: Unlock scalable insights with Data Mesh Architecture. Learn how to drive business growth with decentralized data management.

item.title: SSG Simplified
item.description: Unlock faster websites with Static Site Generation (SSG). Learn how.

item.title: Auto Dev Flow
item.description: Streamline dev workflow with automation. Boost productivity & efficiency.

item.title: API Testing Simplified
item.description: Simplify API testing with top tools like Postman & Insomnia. Learn how to streamline your workflow

item.title: Mobile UI/UX Done Right
item.description: Elevate mobile user experience with expert UI/UX design tips and best practices.

item.title: Boost ASO
item.description: Maximize app visibility with expert ASO tips & strategies.

item.title: Negotiate More
item.description: Boost your tech salary with expert negotiation tips and strategies.

item.title: JWT Auth Made Easy
item.description: Simplify JWT auth implementation with our easy-to-follow guide.

item.title: Boost Mobile Speed
item.description: Improve mobile speed & performance with expert tips and tricks.

item.title: Docker Simplified
item.description: Master Docker containerization with our simplified guide, covering basics to advanced techniques.

item.title: Transfer Learn
item.description: Unlock efficient AI with Transfer Learning. Learn how to implement & boost model performance.
